title: Kaworu Nagisa vs Tabris
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu Nagisa vs. Tabris             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Mon Dec 05, 2011 11:47 pm Ok so..i'm new here , i've seen the anime and incomplete manga ¬_¬ Why did Kaworu appear in/with/on/wtf?, The giant lilith ._. i mean why ?, the only "ingredients" as i call them where Rei , lilith, and mini-adam , so idk he's alive? or Shinji was just hallucinating with him ._. Share Anything? ^^" Edit: i'm sorry i put this here i know it goes in eva disscution but i didn't know when i posted (idk how to move it)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 06, 2011 12:04 am Kaworu, like Rei to Lilith, bears Adam's soul. Kaworu is Adam.

[]: Re: Doubt About Giant Rei/Lilith             Quote Post by Xana » Tue Dec 06, 2011 12:32 am I've also wondered about this for quite some time... Tsuki No Nagisa wrote: the only "ingredients" as i call them where Rei , lilith, and mini-adam

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Dec 06, 2011 5:38 am Sachi wrote: Kaworu, like Rei to Lilith, bears Adam's soul. Kaworu is Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Tue Dec 06, 2011 5:50 am Allemann wrote: Then who or what is Tabris?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Dec 06, 2011 6:22 am EvangelionFan wrote: the product of the remnant of the Soul of Adam bound to the flesh of a Lilim, i.e., bound by force to Lilithian organic material.

[]: No doubt. Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Tue Dec 06, 2011 6:27 am ^ And that is his slave name.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 06, 2011 6:35 am EvangelionFan wrote: My interpretation is that Tabris is the product of the remnant of the Soul of Adam bound to the flesh of a Lilim, i.e., bound by force to Lilithian organic material.

[]: Re: No doubt. Bl             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Dec 06, 2011 7:50 am Alaska Slim wrote: ^ And that is his slave name.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 06, 2011 1:05 pm I figure they're both his "real name", in that "Kaworu Nagisa" and "Tabris" reflect different aspects of his nature.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Dec 06, 2011 1:39 pm Reichu wrote: I figure they're both his "real name", in that "Kaworu Nagisa" and "Tabris" reflect different aspects of his nature.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Wed Dec 07, 2011 4:36 pm Ok....now i'm more confused ._. Kaworu and Tabris is a different person in one body? or what?, i mean the thing i know is that kaworu is an angel , Tabris the angel of free will AND the soul or something(?) of adam. so. eh... i still don't get it!, ok so..he is simply a puppet of SEELE and or he died in the 3I or he died in Shinji's hands, no choice, oh yeah what a free will..

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Wed Dec 07, 2011 4:40 pm Tsuki No Nagisa wrote: Kaworu and Tabris is a different person in one body?

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Thu Dec 08, 2011 1:10 am so..he was kaworu in adam in the hand of gendo? ._. i mean that's my doubt why did he appear if he died...

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Thu Dec 08, 2011 4:33 am Tabris and Nagisa are the same person. Kaworu Nagisa his cover name and Tabris his angelic one. His body was the container for the soul of adam. The thing on gendo's hand was a unborn fish baby. Adam's soul died along with Kaworu/Tabris.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Dec 08, 2011 4:42 am Reichu wrote: I figure they're both his "real name", in that "Kaworu Nagisa" and "Tabris" reflect different aspects of his nature.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Dec 08, 2011 5:01 am Na7e wrote: Adam's soul died along with Kaworu/Tabris.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Dec 08, 2011 9:13 am Sachi wrote: Kaworu is the human that Shinji gets to know and love, while Tabris is the Angel that Shinji needs to kill.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Thu Dec 08, 2011 11:26 am Tsuki No Nagisa wrote: Ok....now i'm more confused ._. Kaworu and Tabris is a different person in one body? or what?, i mean the thing i know is that kaworu is an angel , Tabris the angel of free will AND the soul or something(?) of adam. so. eh... i still don't get it!, ok so..he is simply a puppet of SEELE and or he died in the 3I or he died in Shinji's hands, no choice, oh yeah what a free will..

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Dec 08, 2011 11:39 am liquidus118 wrote: Though he doesn't take all the drugs that she does so is probably more in touch with his Adam-ness than she is her Lillith-yness
